description_long: This is a medium-sized, orange pumpkin with a glossy surface and a short, brownish-green stem on top. The front of the pumpkin is intricately carved with a menacing face, featuring angular, glowing eyes, a small nose, and a jagged, toothy mouth, giving it a classic jack-o'-lantern appearance. The carved sections reveal a hollow interior, likely illuminated from within, which enhances the dramatic effect of the facial features. The rest of the pumpkin's surface is smooth and uncarved, with natural ridges and subtle color variations typical of a real pumpkin. The stem is textured and slightly twisted, adding to the realism. No additional decorative accessories are present, and the pumpkin appears to be designed for display in festive urban settings.
description: A glossy orange pumpkin with a carved, glowing jack-o'-lantern face and a short, textured stem. The front features angular eyes and a jagged mouth, while the rest of the surface is smooth and uncarved.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carved, glowing jack-o'-lantern face with angular eyes, a small nose, and a jagged mouth.
description_view_1: Side view with the stem visible and the edge of the carved face just coming into view; most of the pumpkin surface is uncarved.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, uncarved surface and the stem, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the edge of the carved face and the stem, with most of the pumpkin uncarved.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jack-o'-lantern style with angular, glowing eyes, a small round nose, and a jagged, toothy mouth. The pattern is expressive and menacing, with sharp geometric cutouts for the facial features.
